changes.change: Rewrote implement action to use worktree lifecycle: create → merge → resolve → cleanup
Updated Step 1c — file conflicts advisory only, all parallel uses worktree isolation
Updated detect_file_conflicts() to return advisory severity
Added Worktree Session Recovery section with phase-based recovery options
Added commit step and worktree awareness rules
